     the Fermi energy is    -0.2687 ev

!    total energy              =   -7323.99823521 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.3E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18629664 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.81193857 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -149024.94643438 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75219.40190783 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.82239827 Ry
